text:
Created attachment 253750
multimedia/py-pytubefix

pytubefix is a Python 3 library designed for downloading
YouTube videos and audio. It allows users to download
videos in the highest resolution, extract audio in
MP3 format, and even download complete playlists.

https://github.com/JuanBindez/pytubefix
